item.title: City Council Meeting Scheduled
item.description: City Council Meeting is scheduled for June 23, 2026 at 5:00 PM at City Council Chambers, 501 Poli St., Ventura, CA 93001. The source listing provides the public with the time and location for the Ventura event.

item.description: Water Commission Regular Meeting is scheduled for June 22, 2026 at 5:30 PM at Community Meeting Room, 501 Poli St., 2nd Floor, Ventura, CA 93001. The source listing provides the public with the time and location for the Ventura event.

item.description: Housing Rights Center (HRC) Office Hours is scheduled for June 11, 2026 at 9:30 AM at Tuesdays: Anacapa Conference Room from 9:30 a.m. – 5:00 p.m. Thursdays: Anacapa Conference Room from 9:30 a.m.
